commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5a9cd330be274bd520d6120193cd8506b6a3efc5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates agents bind parsing, docs, and tests so `<channel>:<peer_kind>:<peer_id>` generates `match.peer` route bindings while preserving two-segment account bindings.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +118, Docs +8. Total +166 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.9 parse `feishu:oc_test` as `match.accountId`, while route resolution prioritizes `match.peer` for conversation routing. I did not run a live Feishu route in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the blocker is the public bind grammar and compatibility choice across competing PRs, not a narrow bot-safe repair.

target.title: fix(#95734): [Bug]: agents add --bind generates accountId format, but router only matches peer format
target.author: solodmd

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
